},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7323171830805005096","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"说实话，我觉得作者很有才，而且懂得事情和知识都很多，了解中国的一些经济发展史。而且很多人物符合现实的人，像霍英雄这样的人物，对中国贡献确实大，所以在小说里面是好的一面，这一点我很佩服作者，而且这个小说看着确实很爽，能感受到中国崛起的那种爽感，而且还没带有一些梗，使小说又有一些笑点。希望作者后面的内容越做越好，我是每一期都按时看[偷笑]，尽快更新[做鬼脸]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1705062214,"group_id":"6985461994937650213","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz6gYc1rX9ysPfGF63gxsB8Y0ijy225fuPD+Wijl10Tu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1999337976768121","user_name":"爱吃薏米山药粥的齐藤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1999337976768121","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6985461994937650213","book_info":{"abstract":"前世娶了扶弟魔，父母被拖累病逝，蹉跎一生，上天给了陈默一次重生的机会回到20年前。
